sentences.arabic: عَادَتِ الْأَمْطَارُ إِلَى مَنَاطِقِ تَعَانِي مِنَ الْجَفَافِ مُنْذُ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Kiše su se vratile u područja koja pate od suše već godinama.
sentences.translationEn: Rain has returned to areas that have been suffering from drought for years.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الْمُزَارِعُونَ بِهَذِهِ الْأَمْطَارِ لِأَنَّهَا أَنْقَذَتْ مَحَاصِيلَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Farmeri su bili sretni zbog ovih kiša jer su spasile njihove usjeve.
sentences.translationEn: Farmers were happy about the rain because it saved their crops.

sentences.arabic: امْتَلَأَتِ الْأَنْهَارُ وَالْبُحَيْرَاتُ الصَّغِيرَةُ بِالْمَاءِ مِنْ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Rijeke i mala jezera su se ponovo napunila vodom.
sentences.translationEn: Rivers and small lakes filled with water again.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ أَحَدُ الْمُزَارِعِينَ إِنَّهُ لَمْ يَرَ مَطَرًا كَهَذَا مُنْذُ عَشْرِ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Jedan od farmera rekao je da nije vidio ovakvu kišu već deset godina.
sentences.translationEn: One farmer said he had not seen rain like this for ten years.

sentences.arabic: تَأْمَلُ الْقُرَى أَنْ تَعُودَ الزِّرَاعَةُ إِلَى طَبِيعَتِهَا وَأَنْ يَعِيشَ النَّاسُ بِحَالٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Sela se nadaju da će se poljoprivreda vratiti u normalu i da će ljudi živjeti bolje.
sentences.translationEn: Villages hope that farming will return to normal and that people will live better lives.
